untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection requires identifying two peaks (Adam and Eve) with specific geometric relationships (Adam peak lower than Eve peak, 16-day width measured between highest highs), U-shaped volume pattern between peaks, and breakout confirmation. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and custom peak-detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also references market regime terms (BULL_MARKET, BEAR_MARKET) not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume confirmation as proxy for pattern setup. Entry reduced to volume breakout condition. Exit uses reversal above prior high as reasonable SHORT exit. However, the core Adam and Eve Double Top pattern detection—identifying two distinct peaks with lower first peak, measuring exact width, and analyzing volume shape—cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators alone. This pattern requires custom pattern-recognition code or machine learning model.
